metadata.description: Taiwan GeoDoc Hub is a SaaS platform designed for Taiwanese land data, providing land transcript analysis and announcement value query functions, supporting multi-tenant, multi-role, and point system management.

footer.copyright: © {year} Taiwan GeoDoc Hub. All rights reserved.

cookie-consent-notice.message: This website uses cookies to improve your browsing experience, analyze website traffic, and provide personalized content. If you continue to use this website, you agree to our use of cookies. Please refer to <PrivacyPolicy>Privacy Policy</PrivacyPolicy> for more information.

metadata.title: Select Tenant
metadata.description: Please select the tenant you want to operate to enter the backend system

create-tenant.title: Create New Tenant
create-tenant.description: Please enter the tenant name, and submit it to wait for the system administrator to review.

messages.tenant-created: Tenant created successfully! Please wait for the system administrator to review it.

metadata.title: Welcome to Taiwan GeoDoc Hub
metadata.description: Taiwan GeoDoc Hub is a SaaS platform designed for Taiwanese land data users, providing land transcript analysis and announcement value query functions, supporting multi-tenant, multi-role, and point system management.

/auth/sign-in.agreement: By logging in, you agree to our <TermsOfUse>Terms of Use</TermsOfUse> and <PrivacyPolicy>Privacy Policy</PrivacyPolicy>.

infos.quick-start: Learn how to use GeoDoc Hub

transcripts.title: Transcripts
transcripts.description: Upload PDF format transcripts, and the system will automatically parse and convert them to Excel format.

deposit-points.title: Deposit Points
deposit-points.description: Contact customer service for offline deposit, increasing your point balance.
